rows.label: tev000492_MSG0001
rows.name:
Good morning to you, [ST:playername ]. I'm pleased
to see you awake and hard at work
at this earliest of hours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0002
rows.name: Were you just passing by?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0003
rows.name:
As you can see, I'm performing an inspection
of the integrated production plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev000492_SEL0011
rows.name:
Clarify whether or not
H.B. is a Companion.

rows.label: tev000492_JNK0020
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: tev000492_SEL0021
rows.name: Commend H.B. for doing BLADE HQ's job.

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see you've learned nothing from our
last encounter. And I grow weary of
having to remind the likes of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0005
rows.name:
Once again, I am a
Pathfinder. Path. Finder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0006
rows.name:
Truly, your powers of perception
place you among BLADE's elite![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0007
rows.name:
I heard that since the xenoforms arrived here
in NLA, the integrated production plant has
been running at full capacity, day and night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0008
rows.name:
If any sort of trouble were to occur here,
it would be a serious setback for BLADE, the
civilians of NLA, and the xenoforms alike.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's when you're at your busiest that you're most likely
to miss the early signs of trouble, so I figured the
plant could benefit from a third-party inspection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0010
rows.name: And that is what brings me here today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_JNK0030
rows.name: Assure

rows.label: tev000492_SEL0031
rows.name:
Tell H.B. that the plant is
in no immediate danger.

rows.label: tev000492_JNK0040
rows.name: Cooperate

rows.label: tev000492_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask H.B. if there's anything
you can do to help.

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0011
rows.name:
I agree—I've found nothing
of serious concern.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0012
rows.name:
The plant is being run by
professionals, and my fears
appear to be wholly unfounded.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0013
rows.name:
Outside of an abrupt 2,000 percent
increase in pizza requests, the plant
faces no significant challenges.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0014
rows.name: I am grateful for your offer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0015
rows.name:
However, your assistance is not needed at
this time. I fear this inspection has been
a waste of my own considerable talents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0016
rows.name:
The plant is well-run, and the staff's
most pressing problem is an abrupt 2,000
percent increase in pizza requests.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0017
rows.name:
And by de-prioritizing lower-demand items, the
staff has managed to increase their pizza
production without significant disruptions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0018
rows.name:
Now if you'll excuse me, I must
report my findings to HQ.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0019
rows.name:
I am pleased to see you faring well, but
do not let complacency be your undoing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000492_MSG0020
rows.name: I hope we can work together again soon.[ST:wait ]
